name: azure-diagram-builder-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Azure Architecture Diagram Builder capabilities as tools for az prototype and other MCP clients

scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:icons && npm run sync:pricing
scripts.build: tsc && cp src/iconMap.generated.json dist/iconMap.generated.json && cp src/iconSvgs.generated.json dist/iconSvgs.generated.json && cp src/pricing.generated.json dist/pricing.generated.json
